provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, healing magic scroll, neatly rolled clean white parchment tied with a fresh green vine-patterned ribbon, emerald green wax seal stamped with a leaf motif, the paper looks pristine and new, soft green and white tones suggesting restoration and life, gentle warm highlights on the paper surface
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Flat paper with a leaf and twig, light background. Not a scroll. Violates PAL-002.
